name: BlendType
summary: Blend types used for creating filleted Brep edges

enum_values.name: Chamfer
enum_values.summary: Creates a ruled surface between brep edges with varying chamfer distances.

enum_values.name: Fillet
enum_values.summary: Creates a tangent surface between brep edges with varying radius values.

enum_values.name: Blend
enum_values.summary: Creates a curvature-continuous blend surface between brep edges with varying radius values.
